summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No security-sensitive items were detected. Close, merge, fix, and low-signal closeout paths are disabled or blocked by the job policy, so all open PRs remain open. Human review is needed for the maintainer-owned PR and for contributor PRs with proof, review, or technical-correctness gates still unresolved.

actions.reason: Focused contributor bug fix with remaining proof/technical-correctness judgment; no close, merge, fix, or replacement PR action is allowed in this job.
Maintainer-owned, assigned, active maintainer signal, large automation surface, and failing checks require human handling under the job's require_human_for policy.
Useful focused contributor PR for #93204, but it has an actionable review/change gate and failed proof check. Fix/merge actions are not allowed in this inventory job.
Broad contributor feature/behavior change with unresolved proof and compatibility judgment. Job policy blocks merge and fix paths, so human review is required.
Related to the already merged #86238 family, but not a boring duplicate: it changes durable preservation behavior and has an unresolved restart/proof concern. Human technical review is required.
Related Mattermost follow-up, but not part of this PR inventory shard's closeout or fix path.
Related canonical issue for the Mattermost backfill topic; keep open because the candidate PR is not merge-ready and fix/close actions are disabled.

needs_human: #93202: Feishu message.edit fix still needs maintainer proof/technical-correctness judgment; no merge/fix action is allowed.
